title: Junior Investment Banker at Bajaj Finance Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at Bajaj Finance Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Bajaj Finance Consulting Pvt Ltd in Vadodara is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bajaj Finance Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Bajaj Finance Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Finance Consulting Pvt Ltd!
